summary: PR 2511 advances trophy-list decomp work in src/melee/ty/tylist.c, promotes shared Toy/Ty struct definitions into src/melee/ty/types.h, updates the un_8031305C prototype, and removes duplicate local ToyGlobals-style structs from toy.c. The bot report records 5 new tylist matches and 4 unmatched-item improvements, with one .data regression.

key_files.role: Main decomp/matching work for tylist functions, including un_80313774 implementation, helper cleanup, typed field use, and matching-tactic adjustments.
evidence_refs: metadata_json.changed_files: src/melee/ty/tylist.c added 190 deleted 154 hunks 21
text_corpus.issue_comment: bot report lists tylist matches and improvements

key_files.role: Shared type definitions updated for TyListArg, TyListState, and ToyGlobalsS_/ToySubStructS_.
evidence_refs: metadata_json.changed_files: src/melee/ty/types.h added 35 deleted 10 hunks 3
raw_diff: TyListArg x0/x4/xC/x10/x14 fields replaced by links[3], jobjs[3], texts[3]
raw_diff: ToySubStructS_ and expanded ToyGlobalsS_ added to types.h

key_files.role: Header prototype updated for recovered un_8031305C return type.
evidence_refs: metadata_json.changed_files: src/melee/ty/tylist.h added 1 deleted 1 hunks 1
raw_diff: un_8031305C return type changed from s8 to s32

key_files.role: Removed duplicate local ToyGlobals/TyUnk struct definitions and switched uses to the shared ToyGlobalsS_ type.
evidence_refs: metadata_json.changed_files: src/melee/ty/toy.c added 6 deleted 55 hunks 4
raw_diff: local ToyGlobalsS_, ToyGlobals2S_, ToyGlobals3S_, ToyGlobals4S_, ToyGlobals5S_, ToySubStructS_, TyUnk25 removed
raw_diff: un_80310324 and un_80310660 locals recast to ToyGlobalsS_

what_changed.text: Implemented previously placeholder-covered un_80313774 in tylist.c, initializing TyListState, circular TyListArg links, JObj/text resources, selected index state, and scroll positioning.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: /// #un_80313774 removed and function body added
text_corpus.issue_comment: un_80313774 improved from 0.00% to 62.48%

what_changed.text: Cleaned expanded JObj translation/assert code in un_80313508 into HSD_JObjSetTranslateX/Y/Z calls and structured parent/non-parent return paths.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: un_80313508 replaces direct translate writes and expanded __assert blocks with HSD_JObjSetTranslateX/Y/Z
text_corpus.issue_comment: un_80313508 reported as 100.00% match

what_changed.text: Recovered TyListArg field groups as links[3], jobjs[3], and texts[3], then updated tylist.c users from x0/x4/xC/x10/x14 to typed array accesses.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: types.h TyListArg field replacement
raw_diff: tylist.c updates row->links[1], entry->links[0/1], arg->jobjs[1/2], entry->texts[0..2]

what_changed.text: Updated TyListState to expose x2C2 and adjusted some state accesses from raw byte pointer indexing to named fields.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: types.h adds TyListState x2C2
raw_diff: fn_8031438C changes ((s8*) state)[0x2C2] to state->x2C2

what_changed.text: Changed un_8031305C return type from s8 to s32 in both source and header, with PAD_STACK changed from 8 to 0xC and a boolean-like local assignment added.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: tylist.c un_8031305C signature and PAD_STACK change
raw_diff: tylist.h prototype changed to s32
text_corpus.issue_comment: un_8031305C reported as 100.00% match

what_changed.text: Moved ToyGlobalsS_/ToySubStructS_ style type definitions into types.h and removed several local duplicate or partial ToyGlobals/TyUnk structs from toy.c.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: toy.c deletion of local ToyGlobals* and TyUnk25 definitions
raw_diff: types.h adds ToySubStructS_ and expanded ToyGlobalsS_

what_changed.text: Changed several archive symbol string literals in un_803124BC/un_8031263C to offsets from un_803FDD18; bot report shows these functions matched but also reports a .data regression.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: archiveName and lbArchive_LoadSymbols arguments changed from literals to data + offsets
text_corpus.issue_comment: un_803124BC and un_8031263C reported as 100.00% matches
text_corpus.issue_comment: .data regression from 20.07% to 4.40%

smart_moves.text: Centralizing shared ToyGlobalsS_/ToySubStructS_ in types.h reduced duplicate local struct variants in toy.c and allowed tylist.c to use the same aggregate type.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: toy.c removes multiple local ToyGlobals* struct definitions
raw_diff: types.h adds shared ToyGlobalsS_

smart_moves.text: Array grouping of repeated TyListArg pointer roles made circular list navigation and JObj/text resource accesses more explicit than anonymous x0/x4/xC/x10/x14 fields.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: TyListArg links[3], jobjs[3], texts[3]
raw_diff: tylist.c circular initialization of links[0] and links[1]

smart_moves.text: Mapping expanded JObj translate writes back to existing HSD_JObjSetTranslate* helpers aligns with header-inline cleanup practice and coincides with a bot-reported match for un_80313508.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: HSD_JObjSetTranslateX/Y/Z introduced
text_corpus.issue_comment: un_80313508 98.71% to 100.00%

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a struct has repeated same-role pointer slots, testing an array field such as links[3], jobjs[3], or texts[3] can clarify uses across initialization and traversal while preserving exact offsets.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: TyListArg changed to links[3], jobjs[3], texts[3]
raw_diff: un_80313774 initializes links as a circular list and fills jobjs/texts arrays

decomp_lessons.lesson: Expanded JObj translate/assert sequences can sometimes be replaced by existing HSD_JObjSetTranslate* helpers when the generated block corresponds to header-level setter behavior.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: direct jobj->translate writes and __assert blocks replaced by HSD_JObjSetTranslateX/Y/Z
text_corpus.issue_comment: un_80313508 became 100.00%

decomp_lessons.lesson: A code-match PR can still create data-section noise; bot-reported .data regressions should be preserved as evidence rather than inferred away from text-section wins.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: string literal arguments changed to un_803FDD18 offset expressions
text_corpus.issue_comment: .data regression reported at -63 bytes, 20.07% to 4.40%

naming_conventions.name: TyListArg.links
naming_conventions.meaning: Recovered adjacent TyListArg pointers used as previous/next-style circular links; exact directional semantics are shown by use of links[0] and links[1], but the PR does not rename them prev/next.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: TyListArg links[3]
raw_diff: un_80313774 assigns links[0] to previous entry and links[1] to next entry

naming_conventions.name: TyListArg.jobjs
naming_conventions.meaning: Recovered adjacent HSD_JObj pointer slots used by list entries.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: TyListArg jobjs[3]
raw_diff: un_80312E88 and un_80313464 use jobjs[0], jobjs[1], jobjs[2]

naming_conventions.name: TyListArg.texts
naming_conventions.meaning: Recovered adjacent HSD_Text pointer slots used for entry text objects.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: TyListArg texts[3]
raw_diff: un_80313774 initializes texts[0], texts[1], texts[2]

naming_conventions.name: TyListWaitData
naming_conventions.meaning: Temporary typed view for entry->x4 wait data fields x20 and x24 in fn_8031438C.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: TyListWaitData added in tylist.c
raw_diff: fn_8031438C casts entry->x4 to TyListWaitData* and writes x24/x20

naming_conventions.name: ToyGlobalsS_
naming_conventions.meaning: Combined Toy globals layout moved to types.h and reused by toy.c/tylist.c.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: types.h adds ToyGlobalsS_
raw_diff: toy.c locals changed from ToyGlobals2S_/3S_/4S_/5S_/TyUnk25 to ToyGlobalsS_

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: PAD_STACK retained/adjusted narrowly in tylist.c functions.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: un_8031305C changes PAD_STACK(8) to PAD_STACK(0xC); fn_8031438C keeps PAD_STACK(0x18); un_803147C4 keeps PAD_STACK(8). Bot evidence supports matches/improvements for the touched functions but does not explain the stack tactic.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: un_8031305C PAD_STACK(0xC)
raw_diff: fn_8031438C PAD_STACK(0x18)
raw_diff: un_803147C4 PAD_STACK(8)
text_corpus.issue_comment: un_8031305C and fn_8031438C reported as 100.00%; un_803147C4 improved

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used raw data-pointer offsets for archive/symbol strings from un_803FDD18.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: un_803124BC and un_8031263C replace string literals with data + offsets. The functions matched according to the bot report, but .data regressed, so this should be reviewed as a risky data/text tradeoff rather than a global style.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: data + 0x608/0x614/0x9DC/etc. used in lbArchive_LoadSymbols calls
text_corpus.issue_comment: un_803124BC and un_8031263C 100.00%; .data regression

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used typed casts and pointer arithmetic selectively where structure recovery was incomplete.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: fn_803147C4 switches to char* data plus offsets for state regions, while fn_8031438C improves other accesses to named state/archive fields.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: un_803147C4 uses char* data and memzero(data + 0x2AC), HSD_GObj** gobj = data + 0x2C4
raw_diff: fn_8031438C uses state->x2C2 and archive->jobjs[i]

accepted_candidate_records.title: Group repeated adjacent same-role struct fields into arrays when usage supports it
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2511 recovered TyListArg pointer slots as links[3], jobjs[3], and texts[3], then used those arrays across circular-list initialization, JObj updates, and text allocation.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: TyListArg field replacement
raw_diff: tylist.c uses links/jobjs/texts arrays

accepted_candidate_records.title: Prefer existing JObj setters over expanded translate/assert blocks when evidence matches
accepted_candidate_records.text: un_80313508 replaced generated-looking direct translate writes plus assert/dirty logic with HSD_JObjSetTranslateX/Y/Z and reached a bot-reported 100.00% match.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: HSD_JObjSetTranslateX/Y/Z introduced
text_corpus.issue_comment: un_80313508 100.00%

source_update_candidates.title: src/melee/ty/types.h owns shared TyListArg and ToyGlobalsS_ layouts after PR 2511
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2511 updated src/melee/ty/types.h with TyListArg links/jobjs/texts arrays and added shared ToySubStructS_/ToyGlobalsS_ definitions, while toy.c removed duplicate local ToyGlobals-style structs.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: types.h TyListArg and ToyGlobalsS_ changes
raw_diff: toy.c local struct deletions
source_update_candidates.reason: This is a path/source ownership fact candidate, not a global decomp standard.

source_update_candidates.title: Flag string-literal-to-data-offset edits when text matches but .data regresses
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2511 matched un_803124BC and un_8031263C while changing archive symbol string literals to un_803FDD18 offset expressions, and the bot report recorded a .data regression. Curator may compare this against existing literal/data standards to decide whether a more specific caution is warranted.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbArchive_LoadSymbols string arguments changed to data + offsets
text_corpus.issue_comment: .data regression from 20.07% to 4.40%
source_update_candidates.reason: Existing standards already caution against string/data churn; this PR provides a concrete example but should not be promoted without curator review.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that replacing string literals with data + offsets is accepted style; this PR includes a .data regression and no explanatory review.
Do not infer full match for un_80313774; bot report says it improved only to 62.48%.
Do not infer human reviewer approval or intent; no human review comments are present.
Do not promote PAD_STACK changes as general style; the diff shows them and bot metrics support nearby matches, but no explicit rationale is loaded.
